SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR WONG, LAWRENCE AS ATTORNEY FOR ZHOU, YEN (PP)

PETITIONER IN PRO PER. NORMAN LEW WITH RESPONDENT. STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE SIGNED. THE TWO MINOR CHILDREN HAVE BEEN RESIDING IN HONG KONG FOR THE LAST SIX MONTHS. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT DECLINED TO EXERCISE JURISDICTION OVER THE CUSTODY OF THE TWO MINOR CHILDREN, PENDING CERTIFIED PROOF FROM THE COURT IN HONG KONG THAT IT HAS JURISDICTION OVER THE MATTER. COUNSEL FOR RESPONDENT SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER AFTER HEARING. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR #5208.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- LOWELL H. SUCHERMAN
DECLARATION OF NORMAN LEW RE: CERTIFIED DOCUMENTATION EVIDENCING ACCEPTANCE OF HONG KONG COURT OVER JURISDICTION OF MINOR CHILDREN FILED BY RESPONDENT CHUNG, NGHIA HUNG
